heroText: I create beauty, lifestyle, and travel content that feels natural, thoughtful, and genuinely worth watching.
location: Based in Chicago, IL · Available worldwide
aboutText: My content blends clean visuals with a natural point of view. I focus on creating work that feels polished enough for a brand, but personal enough for people to trust.
statement: Real moments. Thoughtful visuals. Content your audience can trust.

services.title: UGC Videos
services.text: Vertical short-form content for organic social media and paid advertising.

services.title: Product Photography
services.text: Clean lifestyle images for social posts, websites, and product listings.

services.title: Voiceover & Tutorials
services.text: Natural voiceover, demos, routines, reviews, and how-to content.

services.title: Raw Footage
services.text: High-quality unedited clips your team can repurpose into multiple creatives.

services.title: Hook Variations
services.text: Alternate hooks, CTAs, and versions for creative testing.

services.title: Monthly Packages
